questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'ab34977d-138a-42e6-8af4-13ffbf51d393' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '030c18ff-7a74-445f-a11e-1dcee18bf7ae'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'ab34977d-138a-42e6-8af4-13ffbf51d393'; delete from question_items where id = 'ab34977d-138a-42e6-8af4-13ffbf51d393';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
